name: Product Card
description: A refined product display card featuring image overlays, branding, and pricing details.

guidelines.purpose: Product Card is a refined component for displaying products in a grid or list. It features an image area with optional badge overlays and a body area with branding, naming, rating, and pricing information.

anatomy.image_wrap: pcard__img-wrap. Contains product image/icon, badge overlay (Tag), and a wish button (Heart icon).
anatomy.body: pcard__body. Contains brand name, product name, rating (Score), and price row.
anatomy.wish_button: pcard__wish. Circular button for heart-ing items.

variants.sale_price: Triggered by salePriceAlert, changes price color to var(--color-content-alert).
variants.badge: Optional badge overlay on the top-left of the image using gradient-primary or other Tag variants.

typography.name: Primary product name text.
typography.price: var(--sizing-400) bold text. Default var(--color-content-primary), Alert var(--color-content-alert).
